case_title: FLUETER, CHRISTEL VS JUST WATER HEATERS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY FLUETER, CHRISTEL AS TO DEFENDANT JUST WATER HEATERS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JUST WATER HEATERS, INC.
